title: Relationships & Society
topics: relationships · social issues · community · expressing opinions
description: Mezilidské vztahy a společenská témata — slovní zásoba a jak o nich mluvit.

examples.en: She confides in her sister about everything.
The generation gap between parents and children is growing.
examples.cz: Generační propast mezi rodiči a dětmi se prohlubuje.

examples.en: Peer pressure can lead young people to make poor decisions.
examples.cz: Tlak vrstevníků může vést mladé lidi ke špatným rozhodnutím.

examples.en: A healthy relationship requires mutual respect and compromise.
examples.cz: Zdravý vztah vyžaduje vzájemnou úctu a kompromis.

examples.en: It's important to challenge stereotypes and prejudice.
examples.cz: Je důležité zpochybňovat stereotypy a předsudky.

quiz.sentence: They argued but ___ up after a few days.
Good relationships are built on ___ and honesty.
She ___ in her best friend about her problems.
We need more ___ communities where everyone feels welcome.

tasks: 1. Describe a relationship (friendship, family, work) that is important to you
2. Write about a social issue in your community and suggest solutions
3. Discuss: Is social media helping or harming real-life relationships? (150 words)
